data.title: Billionaire Investor Ray Dalio Urges Xi Jinping's China To Implement This To Prevent Debt Crisis: 'They Have The Willingness To Do That'
data.description: This comes in the wake of China's recent stimulus measures, which Dalio believes should be complemented with this strategy to avert a potential debt crisis.

data.title: NHTSA Opens Probe Into 2.4M Tesla Vehicles After Reports Of 4 Crashes With FSD Involved
data.description: NHTSA said on Friday that it is opening an investigation into nearly 2.4 million Tesla vehicles on the heels of reports of four crashes where its FSD partial driving automation system was engaged.

data.title: Cloudflare Opens New Lisbon HQ, Supporting 350+ Employees
data.description: Cloudflare expands in EMEA with new HQ in Lisbon, Portugal and plans for further growth. Key executives and local officials attend the opening event.

data.title: Gold Surges Past $2,700 To Record High; Asia And Europe Markets In Green - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: US markets mixed on 10/17, Dow at record high on strong retail sales and upbeat earnings from Taiwan Semiconductor. Gold surged on election uncertainty.

data.title: Hedge Fund Billionaire Daniel Loeb Bets On Trump Win, Singles Out This Recent Buy As Having 'Significant Upside Potential'
data.description: Hedge fund manager Daniel Loeb is optimistic about the economy and market and he sees Trump likely retaking White House.
